name: Two-Level Dirichlet Posterior Mixing (N-gram + Phrase)
blurb: Dirichlet-Multinomial posterior predictive at two levels: 15-gram backoff (c=5.0) and phrase suffix matching (probes=[20,16], c=2.0). Neural LM as hierarchical Bayesian base measure. 3-seed mean 0.11968 BPB, std 0.000003. Removing Dirichlet from phrase mixing degrades BPB 8.9x.
author: Robert Sneiderman
